name: Smaran Daily AI News → GitHub PR

parameters.name: q
parameters.value: AI OR "artificial intelligence" OR "AI policy" OR "AI regulation" OR smartphone OR chip OR hardware

parameters.jsCode:
const items = $input.all().map(i => i.json);
return [{ json: { candidates: items } }];

const card = JSON.parse($json.choices[0].message.content); function esc(s){return (s||'').replace(/&/g,'&').replace(//g,'>').replace(/"/g,'"');} const tpl = `

${esc(card.title)}

${esc(card.excerpt)}

Story via ${esc(card.source_name)} Summarized by Smaran
`; return [{ json: { card, cardHtml: tpl } }];

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ message: 'AI news: ' + JSON.parse($('Decide — Claude picks the story').item.json.choices[0].message.content).title, content: $('Compute updated HTML').item.json.blogContentB64, sha: $('Compute updated HTML').item.json.blogSha, branch: $('Compute updated HTML').item.json.branchName }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ message: 'AI news teaser: ' + JSON.parse($('Decide — Claude picks the story').item.json.choices[0].message.content).title, content: $('Compute updated HTML').item.json.indexContentB64, sha: $('Compute updated HTML').item.json.indexSha, branch: $('Compute updated HTML').item.json.branchName }) }}
